---
name: 🚀 Add a Project
about: Showcase a project you or your team built.
title: 'Project: [Your Project Name]'
labels: ['project', 'enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

**Project Name:**
The name of your project.

**Project Description:**
A brief description of your project (1-3 sentences).

**Authors (Optional):**
Your name(s) or GitHub handle(s). Only provide this if you are comfortable having it displayed publicly.

**Repository URL (Optional):**
The link to your project's GitHub repository or other source code hosting.

**Live Demo URL (Optional):**
A link to a live demo or deployed version of your project.

**Tags:**
A comma-separated list of relevant tags for your project (e.g., `web`, `mobile`, `AI`, `game`, `React`, `Python`).

**Featured? (Optional):**
Would you like this project to be considered for showcasing on the homepage?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

**Additional Notes (Optional):**
Any other information you'd like to provide.
